/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/alchemy-crack.dir/src/engine/rules.cpp.o CMakeFiles/alchemy-crack.dir/src/engine/threadpool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/alchemy-crack.dir/src/engine/wordlist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/alchemy-crack.dir/src/gpu/gpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/alchemy-crack.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/alchemy-crack.dir/src/modules/offline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/alchemy-crack.dir/src/ui/tui.cpp.o -o alchemy-crack  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lcurses /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libform.so
